note: S1 kept faithful and extended: every 60 normal hits applies Damage Taken +12.56% (3s) and 158.43% additional damage to the boss, plus a 20-round self reload modeled as instantReload fraction 20/300 = 0.0667 (the parser dropped this as unsupported). S2's '60 core hits' additional-damage proc (109.64%) cannot see the runtime core-hit rate from a hitCount trigger, so it is approximated as one proc per 120 normal hits (assuming ~50% core-hit rate); this is the main approximation and will over/under-count at other core rates. S2's 'beginning of Full Burst -> Crit Rate +14.6% (10s)' was skipped by the parser (unsupported trigger); modeled here as a fullBurstEnter self buff. Burst slot left to parser (self ATK 62.54% 10s + Reloading Speed 67.2% 20s) as faithful.
